home.heroDescription: pests, nutrient deficiency, and fungal infections. Increase yields by 30%, reduce costs by 40%.
home.featuresDesc: Cutting-edge technology designed to revolutionize every aspect of your agricultural operations
home.aboutTitle: AgriSphere AI is India's first comprehensive AI + GIS Smart Farming Intelligence Platform. We combine multi-class disease detection, digital twin technology, yield prediction, and end-to-end agricultural advisory to transform farming from seed to market.
home.aboutDesc: Our platform supports offline mode for villages, Hindi voice commands, government scheme recommendations, farmer-buyer marketplace, and blockchain traceability. From small family farms to large commercial operations, we provide rural-accessible technology that increases yields by 30% while reducing costs by 40%.
home.howItWorksSubtitle: Get started in minutes with our simple 4-step process
home.ctaDesc: Join thousands of farmers who are already using AgriSphere AI to increase yields and reduce costs

t1.name: Rajesh Kumar
t1.text: AgriSphere's multi-class AI detected stem borer in my wheat early. The pest prediction saved my entire 10-acre crop and increased yield by 35%!

t2.name: Anita Sharma
t2.text: The GIS digital twin mapped my field perfectly. AI-powered management cut water usage by 45%. Marketplace got me ₹2000/quintal extra!

t3.name: Vikram Patel
t3.text: Voice assistant in Hindi is amazing! 'Tamatar mein rog hai' - instantly got disease type, treatment cost. Offline mode works perfectly in my village.

tech.title: Built on Cutting-Edge Technology
tech.subtitle: Enterprise-grade tech stack powering your farm

footer.tagline: Empowering farmers with AI and GIS technology for sustainable, profitable agriculture.

disease.title: AI Crop Disease Detection
disease.desc: Revolutionary multi-class AI system detecting diseases, pests, nutrient deficiencies, and soil texture from leaf, stem, fruit, and soil images with 95%+ accuracy using ensemble CNN models.

leaf.title: Leaf Disease Detection
leaf.desc: Analyze leaf images for fungal infections, bacterial diseases, and viral infections

stem.desc: Detect stem borers, rot, and structural damage in crop stems

fruit.desc: Identify fruit diseases, pest damage, and quality issues

soil.desc: AI-powered soil texture and nutrient deficiency detection

yield.title: Optimized Yield Prediction
yield.desc: Predict crop yield using advanced XGBoost models trained on 23 years of Meghalaya's climate data.
yield.accuracyNote: Note: Rice predictions are now highly accurate (~99.7%) thanks to the integration of Soil Health Card data (pH, N, P, K).
yield.readyDesc: Enter parameters and click "Generate Prediction" to see results.

summary.report: Your predicted yield for {{crop}} is {{total}} tons. To maintain this efficiency of {{efficiency}} tons per hectare, ensure optimal NPK levels and timely irrigation as per the weather forecast.

hero.title: Voice Assistant for Farmers
hero.desc: Speak naturally in Hindi or your local language. Get instant AI-powered agricultural advice with voice responses designed for rural farmers.

f1.title: Hindi Voice Recognition
f1.desc: Speak naturally in Hindi and get instant responses
f1.example: Gehun mein rog a gaya hai, kya karein?
f1.response: Wheat disease detected. Apply fungicide spray.

f2.title: Local Language Support
f2.desc: Support for regional languages across India

f3.title: Audio Responses
f3.desc: Get detailed audio responses in your preferred language

f4.title: Offline Voice Commands
f4.desc: Basic voice commands work even without internet

e1.farmer: Tomato mein patte peelay ho rahe hain
e1.ai: यह नाइट्रोजन की कमी हो सकती है। यूरिया का छिड़काव करें।
e1.aiTrans: This could be nitrogen deficiency. Apply urea spray.
e1.solution: Apply 2kg urea per acre with water spray

e2.ai: मिट्टी में नमी 40% है। 2 दिन बाद पानी दें।
e2.aiTrans: Soil moisture is 40%. Water after 2 days.

e3.farmerTrans: When should I harvest the crop?
e3.ai: आपकी गेहूं 15 दिन में तैयार होगी। दाने सुनहरे होने का इंतज़ार करें।
e3.aiTrans: Your wheat will be ready in 15 days. Wait for golden grains.

s1.title: Speak Question
s1.desc: Ask in Hindi or local language

cropLoss.title: Crop Loss Compensation Claim
cropLoss.subtitle: Government of India - Ministry of Agriculture

advisory.title: Confirm your adherence to AgriSphere advisories. This impacts claim approval.
advisory.verifiedNote: Will be verified against AI usage logs.

ai.title: AI Assistant Tips
ai.uploadPhotos: Please upload photos of affected leaves/stems for AI verification.
ai.specifyPest: Mention specific pest name if known (e.g., Pink Bollworm).
ai.gpsEnable: Ensure GPS location is enabled while taking photos.

evidence.note: Upload at least 2 photos (Close-up & Wide angle). GPS metadata will be extracted.

declaration.check: I hereby declare that the information provided above is true.
declaration.note: I understand that any false claim will lead to rejection and legal action.

cropLoss.error: Failed to submit claim. Please try again.
cropLoss.agreeError: You must agree to the declaration.
